title: CoVoST 2 - Speech Translation Evaluation
description: Speech translation quality evaluation based on the CoVoST 2 dataset (Wang et al., arXiv 2020). Annotators listen to source audio, review translations, label audio segments, and rate overall translation quality.
citation:
@article{wang2020covost2,
    title = "{C}o{V}o{ST} 2 and Massively Multilingual Speech-to-Text Translation",
    author = "Wang, Changhan and Wu, Anne and Pino, Juan",
    journal = "arXiv preprint arXiv:2007.10310",
    year = "2020",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/2007.10310"
}
